provocation: We need to be more AGILE and DISRUPTIVE, or we're finished!
comebacks: We could hold a meeting about it.
Sir, you've disrupted your own coffee onto your shirt.

winConsequence.flavorText: The client looks down. Silence. Then: 'You're right. Let's just do good work.' Victory.

loseConsequence.flavorText: He books seventeen alignment workshops. You attend all of them. In spirit, you are elsewhere.

provocation: Let's leverage our synergies to maximize stakeholder value!
comebacks: Which stakeholder? Gino? Gino just wants his mug.
I have a deck about that.

winConsequence.flavorText: He opens his mouth. Closes it. 'Who... who is Gino?' The spell is broken. The room applauds.

loseConsequence.flavorText: Your deck had 4 slides. His had 400. You drown in synergy.

provocation: This quarter we'll simply do MORE with LESS!
comebacks: More what? Less what? I need specifics.
We tried that. The printer is still crying.

winConsequence.flavorText: Everyone turns to the printer. It sobs once, softly. The budget is restored out of pure guilt.

loseConsequence.flavorText: 'Great vision, chief' was, in retrospect, a surrender. The snack budget is gone.

provocation: From today, we are an AI-FIRST company! Humans... second. Or third.
comebacks: Who will laugh at your golf stories, sir?
Can the AI attend your birthday party?

winConsequence.flavorText: His lip trembles. Nobody laughs at his golf stories like Karen does. 'Humans... first-ish,' he whispers.

loseConsequence.flavorText: The AI attends the birthday party. It brings a mathematically optimal gift. Everyone cries, for different reasons.

provocation: Everyone back to the office five days a week! Culture doesn't build itself!
comebacks: The culture is currently a fridge with someone's 2019 yogurt.

winConsequence.flavorText: He checks the fridge. He meets the yogurt. He now works remotely. From another city.

loseConsequence.flavorText: 'Cite sources' triggered a 90-minute presentation on culture. With a quiz at the end.
